KXCPI-26MAY-T0.4.reason: Tariff pass-through adds upside pressure but energy price softening and moderating shelter inflation keep >0.4% below market-implied odds.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.5.reason: Moderate tariff pass-through and sticky services support ~0.45-0.50% MoM; >0.5% is roughly coin-flip relative to consensus.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.6.reason: Tail risk from combined energy rebound and broad tariff pass-through justifies slight premium over Kalshi price.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.7.reason: Meaningful upside scenario requires simultaneous energy spike and full tariff pass-through; low but non-trivial given 2026 trade uncertainty.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.8.reason: Extreme print would require both a large energy surge and broad goods inflation; consistent with Kalshi market price.
